title: Orbs of Creation
description: Adds orbs that can create (pretty much) any item.
body:
Adds 3 diferent orbs capable of turning into items, each with a varying amount of capabilities. These capabilities are shown in the spoiler below.
Spoiler - Lesser Orb of Creation - Can turn into any item with a unique id (does not accept nbt) at the cost of something sparkly - Orb of Creation - Can turn into any item with a unique id (does not accept nbt) - Greater Orb of Creation - Can turn into any item with a unique id (accepts nbt)
Designed for modpack creators and server owners to give out as seen fit.
